sections.markdown:
- Activity: City2Surf
- Started: 2025-08-10 08:45
- Distance: 14 km
- Moving time: 1:12:23
- Elapsed time: 1:12:32
- Elevation gain: 218.8 m
- Average heart rate: 165.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 181 bpm
- Average watts: 240.8 W
- Average speed: 11.6 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `170.8 bpm`, ranging from `169.0` to `172.5 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `171.5 spm`, with a working range of `140.0` to `180.2 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `171.9 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `171.1 spm` (-0.8 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:11 /km` across `13.950 km` in `1:12:23` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:16 /km` and second-half pace was `5:07 /km` (-9 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `165.5 bpm` average and `181 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `159.3 bpm` in the first half and `171.8 bpm` in the second (+12.5 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:12:23` out of `1:12:32` elapsed (99.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `2` stop segments and `0.2%` stationary samples, so the run stayed very continuous.

- Strava logged about `230.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.8 m` and `86.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `151.0 m` in the first half and `79.4 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
